summary: Testing of BITZ Club Referral System: Backend 19/19 tests passed (referral validation, admin dashboard, member stats, reward creation), Frontend 15/15 tests passed (join page referral auto-population, validation indicators, admin referrals page with summary cards, search, filters, export).
seed_data_creation: Used existing test member ID 2607600015 (Raj) for referral validation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All referral system features verified working. Test credentials: admin 9999999999/admin123, test_referral_code 2607600015, test_employee_code BITZ-E001. Features verified: 1) GET /api/referrals/validate validates member IDs (10-digit format), employee codes (BITZ-EXXX), and associate codes (BITZ-AXXX), 2) GET /api/admin/referrals shows all referrals with summary stats and filtering by type, 3) GET /api/members/{id}/referral-stats shows member's referral statistics and link, 4) POST /api/admin/referral-rewards creates rewards, 5) Join page auto-populates referral code from URL params (ref, referral, code, promo) and shows validation status with referrer name, 6) Admin sidebar shows Referrals menu item with navigation to /admin/referrals page.

features_verified.referral_code_validation_api: WORKING - GET /api/referrals/validate validates member IDs, employee codes (BITZ-E*), and associate codes (BITZ-A*)
features_verified.admin_referrals_dashboard: WORKING - GET /api/admin/referrals returns referrals with summary stats, pagination, filtering by type, and search
features_verified.member_referral_stats_api: WORKING - GET /api/members/{id}/referral-stats returns referral code, link, counts, referred members, and rewards
features_verified.join_page_referral_url_params: WORKING - Join page reads referral code from URL params (?ref=, ?referral=, ?code=, ?promo=)
features_verified.join_page_referral_validation: WORKING - Validates referral code on input and shows green checkmark + 'Referred by [name]' text
features_verified.admin_sidebar_referrals_link: WORKING - Gift icon 'Referrals' link visible in admin sidebar
features_verified.admin_referrals_page_ui: WORKING - Shows summary cards (Total Referrers, Total Referred, Employee Refs, Member Refs), search input, type filter dropdown, export button, and referrals list or empty state
